# open-captable-protocol-daml: llm routing

start:
- CLAUDE.md
- README.md
- docs/README.md

generated-files:
- OpenCapTable-v32/daml/Fairmint/OpenCapTable/CapTable.daml is generated; edit scripts/codegen/generate-captable.ts and scripts/codegen/captable-config.yaml instead.

source-of-truth:
- Package names and DAML versions: */daml.yaml
- Repo commands and release tooling: package.json scripts
- CI and publish behavior: .github/workflows/ci.yml and .github/workflows/publish.yml
- Release history: docs/releases/README.md
